final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style smartphone photo of a stylish Korean cafe with coffee and desserts, overlaid with hand-drawn annotations (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a "Korean cafe aesthetic with hand-drawn annotation overlay" look — references in the spirit of 2010s Korean cafe Instagram culture, Japanese magazine 手書きノート (handwritten note) tradition, Instagram Stories sketch sticker style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the coffee and desserts as central subjects with ample negative space for annotations
Subject: must include coffee beverage and dessert items (no people)
Scene/backdrop: must include Korean cafe interior context
Lighting/medium: needs a bright, natural daylight atmosphere suitable for smartphone photography — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, muted Korean cafe palette — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: must include fine white hand-drawn line annotations with rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style; contour lines tracing object outlines; arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) with short diary-style comments:
  - 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：さっぱり、優しい甘み）
  - 食べ物 → 食感・美味しさ（例：しっとり、最高）
  - 空間 → 雰囲気（例：リラックス、素敵な時間）
  - 全体 → 一言まとめ（例：幸せすぎる〜）
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve annotation style: fine white hand-drawn lines, rough single-stroke quality, contour tracing, arrows/dashed lines for guidance; must include decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) with moderation and留白 (negative space); overall Instagram Stories / magazine rough-note aesthetic; stylish yet relaxed atmosphere
Avoid: must avoid human figures; must avoid overcrowding annotations; must avoid excessive decoration without留白
